description:
**Milestone:** Phase 5: Enterprise Features

Community-contributed theme packages on npm with revenue share. Enterprise support SLA with response time guarantees, dedicated channel, and quarterly architecture reviews. Training materials and certification program.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/docs/
- docs/enterprise/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Theme marketplace section on Starlight docs
- [ ] Theme submission and review process
- [ ] Enterprise support tier documentation
- [ ] SLA templates for healthcare customers
- [ ] Training course outline

**Complexity:** large
title: Launch theme marketplace and enterprise support tiers
